subject: [DMAAP-MR] Remove AAF dependency
commit_message:
[DMAAP-MR] Remove AAF dependency

Removing aaf dep from MR
Remove nodeports from MR and BC
Update BC accordingly

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ibc3999bae53b812f8714a1c9a68223757f175a2c
Issue-ID: OOM-2974
